calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2009 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-26-2009 Continued To Dec-24-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Sep-17-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Patrick D. Goggin, Esq. appeared with petitioner Flavia Maucci, who was present as Guardian Ad Litem for the minor Quetzal Maucci, whose appearance at today's hearing was waived via Order of the Court filed today, September 17, 2009.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $7,300.00.
Attorney's Fees - $1,733.75.
Costs - $365.00.

The net balance of $5,201.25 shall be deposited into the client's trust account held by the the attorney for petitioner, Patrick D. Goggin.

Counsel for Petitioner shall submit a proposed Order Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor no later than September 22, 2009.

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-09-2009 Off Calendar

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
